verses.text: That he who believes can immediately obtain (i.e., pardon and peace).

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: In the Acts of the Apostles: “Lo, here is water; what is there which hinders me from being baptized?

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Then said Philip, If thou believest with all thine heart, thou mayest.”
